title: Cute Dog Cookie Cutter 7-8cm | 3D Printed PLA Puppy Biscuit Stamp | Pet Lover Baking Tool Size M
description:
Introducing our adorable Cute Dog Cookie Cutter — the perfect way to bring a little puppy love into your kitchen! Whether you are a passionate home baker, a dog lover, or simply looking for a fun and unique baking accessory, this charming cookie cutter will help you create the most delightful dog-shaped cookies, fondant decorations, and crafting cutouts. Designed with clean, crisp edges and an easy-to-recognize cute dog silhouette, this cutter makes every baking session a joyful experience.

**Features & Details**
This cookie cutter is carefully 3D printed using high-quality, food-safe PLA material, ensuring a durable and reliable tool that produces beautifully defined shapes every single time. The design features a comfortable grip height that makes pressing into dough easy and smooth. The cutting edge is sharp enough to produce clean lines while still being safe to handle, even for kids helping out in the kitchen. Each cutter is individually inspected for quality before shipping, so you can be confident you are receiving a top-notch product.

**Dimensions**
This listing is for our Size M cookie cutter, measuring approximately 7-8cm (2.8-3.1 inches) at the widest point. This is an ideal size for standard cookies, decorated sugar cookies, fondant toppers for cupcakes, and small craft projects. The moderate size works wonderfully for both everyday baking and special event treat tables.

**How to Use**
Using your cute dog cookie cutter is simple and fun. Roll out your cookie dough, fondant, or craft clay to an even thickness of about 4-6mm. Press the cutter firmly and evenly into the material, then gently lift and push out the shape. For best results with sticky doughs, lightly dust the cutter with flour or cornstarch before each press. You can also dip the cutting edge in flour between cuts for cleaner lines. This cutter works beautifully with sugar cookie dough, gingerbread dough, shortbread, rolled fondant, modeling chocolate, and polymer clay.

**Care Instructions**
Printed in food-safe PLA. Hand wash only – not dishwasher safe. Do not use in microwave or oven. To clean, simply rinse under lukewarm water and use a soft brush or cloth to remove any dough residue. Allow the cutter to air dry completely before storing. Avoid exposure to high heat, boiling water, or direct sunlight for prolonged periods, as PLA can soften at elevated temperatures. With proper care, your cookie cutter will last through countless baking sessions.

**Perfect Gift Ideas**
This cute dog cookie cutter makes an absolutely wonderful gift for so many occasions. Surprise a dog-loving friend on their birthday or include it in a holiday stocking stuffer for the baker in your family. It is a fantastic addition to a housewarming gift basket, a bridal shower baking kit, or a fun party favor for a puppy-themed children's birthday celebration. Teachers, coworkers, and pet parents alike will adore receiving this charming and practical little baking tool. Pair it with a favorite cookie recipe card and some sprinkles for an unforgettable handmade gift package.

**About Our Shop**
All of our cookie cutters are lovingly handmade and 3D printed to order in our small workshop, which means each piece is crafted with care and attention to detail. We produce in small batches to maintain the highest quality standards and to minimize waste. Because every item is printed fresh upon ordering, we can also accommodate custom requests and special designs — just send us a message! Thank you for supporting our small creative business and for choosing handmade over mass-produced.
